themeWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him

sentenceTheme: Judah’s allotment is described by its borders, Caleb takes Hebron and Othniel wins Debir, Achsah asks for springs, and the chapter lists Judah’s cities while noting the Jebusites remained in Jerusalem.

verses.text: This then was the lot of the tribe of the children of Judah by their families; even to the border of Edom the wilderness of Zin southward was the uttermost part of the south coast.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And their south border was from the shore of the salt sea, from the bay that looketh southward:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And it went out to the south side to Maaleh-acrabbim, and passed along to Zin, and ascended up on the south side unto Kadesh-barnea, and passed along to Hezron, and went up to Adar, and fetched a compass to Karkaa:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: From thence it passed toward Azmon, and went out unto the river of Egypt; and the goings out of that coast were at the sea: this shall be your south coast.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And the east border was the salt sea, even unto the end of Jordan. And their border in the north quarter was from the bay of the sea at the uttermost part of Jordan:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And the border went up to Beth-hogla, and passed along by the north of Beth-arabah; and the border went up to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And the border went up toward Debir from the valley of Achor, and so northward, looking toward Gilgal, that is before the going up to Adummim, which is on the south side of the river: and the border passed toward the waters of En-shemesh, and the goings out thereof were at En-rogel:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And the border went up by the valley of the son of Hinnom unto the south side of the Jebusite; the same is Jerusalem: and the border went up to the top of the mountain that lieth before the valley of Hinnom westward, which is at the end of the valley of the giants northward:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And the border was drawn from the top of the hill unto the fountain of the water of Nephtoah, and went out to the cities of mount Ephron; and the border was drawn to Baalah, which is Kirjath-jearim:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And the border compassed from Baalah westward unto mount Seir, and passed along unto the side of mount Jearim, which is Chesalon, on the north side, and went down to Beth-shemesh, and passed on to Timnah:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And the border went out unto the side of Ekron northward: and the border was drawn to Shicron, and passed along to mount Baalah, and went out unto Jabneel; and the goings out of the border were at the sea.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And the west border was to the great sea, and the coast thereof. This is the coast of the children of Judah round about according to their families.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh he gave a part among the children of Judah, according to the commandment of the LORD to Joshua, even the city of Arba the father of Anak, which city is Hebron.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Caleb drove thence the three sons of Anak, Sheshai, and Ahiman, and Talmai, the children of Anak.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And he went up thence to the inhabitants of Debir: and the name of Debir before was Kirjath-sepher.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Caleb said, He that smiteth Kirjath-sepher, and taketh it, to him will I give Achsah my daughter to wife.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Othniel the son of Kenaz, the brother of Caleb, took it: and he gave him Achsah his daughter to wife.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And it came to pass, as she came unto him, that she moved him to ask of her father a field: and she lighted off her ass; and Caleb said unto her, What wouldest thou?

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Who answered, Give me a blessing; for thou hast given me a south land; give me also springs of water. And he gave her the upper springs, and the nether springs.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Judah according to their families.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And the uttermost cities of the tribe of the children of Judah toward the coast of Edom southward were Kabzeel, and Eder, and Jagur,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Kinah, and Dimonah, and Adadah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Kedesh, and Hazor, and Ithnan,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Ziph, and Telem, and Bealoth,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Hazor, Hadattah, and Kerioth, and Hezron, which is Hazor,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Amam, and Shema, and Moladah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Hazar-gaddah, and Heshmon, and Beth-palet,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Hazar-shual, and Beer-sheba, and Bizjothjah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Baalah, and Iim, and Azem,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Eltolad, and Chesil, and Hormah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Ziklag, and Madmannah, and Sansannah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Lebaoth, and Shilhim, and Ain, and Rimmon: all the cities are twenty and nine, with their villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And in the valley, Eshtaol, and Zoreah, and Ashnah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Zanoah, and En-gannim, Tappuah, and Enam,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Jarmuth, and Adullam, Socoh, and Azekah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Sharaim, and Adithaim, and Gederah, and Gederothaim; fourteen cities with their villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Zenan, and Hadashah, and Migdal-gad,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Dilean, and Mizpeh, and Joktheel,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Lachish, and Bozkath, and Eglon,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Cabbon, and Lahmam, and Kithlish,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Gederoth, Beth-dagon, and Naamah, and Makkedah; sixteen cities with their villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Libnah, and Ether, and Ashan,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Jiphtah, and Ashnah, and Nezib,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Keilah, and Achzib, and Mareshah; nine cities with their villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Ekron, with her towns and her villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: From Ekron even unto the sea, all that lay near Ashdod, with their villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Ashdod with her towns and her villages, Gaza with her towns and her villages, unto the river of Egypt, and the great sea, and the border thereof:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And in the mountains, Shamir, and Jattir, and Socoh,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Dannah, and Kirjath-sannah, which is Debir,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Anab, and Eshtemoh, and Anim,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Goshen, and Holon, and Giloh; eleven cities with their villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Arab, and Dumah, and Eshean,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Janum, and Beth-tappuah, and Aphekah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Humtah, and Kirjath-arba, which is Hebron, and Zior; nine cities with their villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Maon, Carmel, and Ziph, and Juttah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Jezreel, and Jokdeam, and Zanoah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Cain, Gibeah, and Timnah; ten cities with their villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Halhul, Beth-zur, and Gedor,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Maarath, and Beth-anoth, and Eltekon; six cities with their villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: Kirjath-baal, which is Kirjath-jearim, and Rabbah; two cities with their villages:

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: In the wilderness, Beth-arabah, Middin, and Secacah,

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: And Nibshan, and the city of Salt, and En-gedi; six cities with their villages.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit

verses.text: As for the Jebusites the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the children of Judah could not drive them out: but the Jebusites dwell with the children of Judah at Jerusalem unto this day.

highlightedWords.meaning: praise; Judah, the fourth son of Jacob; also the tribe and territory descended from him
boundary, border, territory, limit
